text:
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes, included in enhanced 5% sample 
Null = Not included in enhanced 5% sample 
COMMENT: 
This enhanced 5% sample is broader than the annual 5% sample (variable that was previously called 
FIVE_PERCENT_FLAG; currently called SAMPLE_GROUP — when value ='01' or '04') because it includes 
all beneficiaries who were ever part of the 5% sample but had a HIC change that was not part of the 
sample. The "enhanced" indicator variable allows for
